business_rule: POSTED tidak boleh di-edit/delete langsung. Koreksi wajib melalui REVERSAL
reversal_flow: 1. Create reversal stock movements (kebalikan dari POST)
2. Create reversal journal entry (kebalikan dari POST)

stock_movements: ASSEMBLY_PRODUCE_REVERSAL: Removes finished product from stock (-qty)

immutability_rule: Journal POSTED immutable. Koreksi via reversal/correcting entry saja.
